---
title: "QGIS specialist module for cadastral surveying"
author:
  - name: Ralph Straumann
    url: https://ralphstraumann.ch
date: "2026-07-21 23:29"
image: "scott-blake-wq7oyx_Kx-4-unsplash.jpg"
description: 'A consortium of 60 Swiss firms has secured funding to build AV-QGIS, a specialist #QGIS module for #cadastralSurveying built around the new #DMAV data model, with basic data updates due by 2028 and full rollout by mid-2028. It''s a welcome sign of competition and sovereign, #openSource alternatives in the #surveying software space.'

---

A group of 60 firms has formed with the aim of implementing a specialist QGIS module for cadastral 
surveying in Switzerland, called AV-QGIS (probably MO-QGIS in French). The group has just 
[announced][announcement] that its funding goal has been met and that the first implementation phase 
for the AV-QGIS module has been approved. 

The specialist module will extend QGIS core functionality and will work with the Swiss cadastral 
surveying data model DMAV 1.0 (more info in [German][dmav-de] and [in French][dmav-fr]). I couldn't 
find much information about the module except a [QGIS user forum presentation][presentation] (pdf) 
from June last year.

![DMAV introduction schedule (source: swisstopo)](dmav-introduction.jpg "DMAV introduction schedule (source: swisstopo)")

According to the [announcement][announcement], work on AV-QGIS has already started. Phases 1 and 2, 
which will enable basic data updates, should be implemented by January 2028. Phase 3 (the final 
phase) will be finalised by mid-2028.

Joining the committee is still possible, with "favourable introductory terms" apparently available 
until end of September.[^group]

Always good to see (increasing) competition and sovereign solutions in the space of software.

[^group]: A website at [av-qgis.ch](https://av-qgis.ch) might be forthcoming? For now, there is only 
a placeholder. But the group can be reached at [info@av-qgis.ch](mailto:info@av-qgis.ch).

[announcement]: https://www.geowebforum.ch/t/av-qgis-av-fachschale-finanzierung-gesichert-und-projekt-gestartet/1486
[dmav-de]: https://www.cadastre-manual.admin.ch/de/geodatenmodell-der-amtlichen-vermessung-dmav
[dmav-fr]: https://www.cadastre-manual.admin.ch/fr/modele-de-geodonnees-de-la-mensuration-officielle-dmav
[presentation]: https://www.qgis.ch/assets/pdf/2025/05_20250617_QGIS-Anwendertagung_Bern_AV-QGIS.pdf
